testimonials.post_content: Code1 assessed our project nature and provided the consultation which helped us to pick the right professionals that could guarantee high-quality project outcomes without compromising our overall workforce hiring budget.

The team at Code1 was able to quickly understand the skill gap at our organization and helped us in the tech team building by providing the best industrial experts. Each of the engineers provided in the team carried the utmost qualifications and skills according to their respective skills.

We were in urgent need of specialized IT talent for our short-term project. As soon as we came in contact with Code1, our challenge of hiring the right person for the leading role was instantly solved.

frequently_asked_question.post_content: Analytics is the process of analyzing historical data to develop insights into trends, which helps predict future events based on sound judgment and evidence. While data analysis can provide insight using this method, data science focuses on more than just number-based datasets, leveraging advanced technologies to develop predictive models that consider many different variables within those datasets.
frequently_asked_question.post_title: What is the difference between data science and analytics?

frequently_asked_question.post_content: It typically takes 6 to 12 weeks to complete the analysis and build a solution that fits your business needs. Still, from there it's anyone's guess - getting everything up and running, verified, and tweaked to get the most out of it can take a few months, and all depends on how ready your business is to move forward.
frequently_asked_question.post_title: How long does it take to implement data science solutions?

frequently_asked_question.post_content: Surely. We deploy properly engineered data solutions to your existing or future data warehouse, lake, or cloud platform. You get special attention to create solutions that are compatible, scalable, and provide minimal disruption to your existing solution.
frequently_asked_question.post_title: Can data science work with existing data systems?

frequently_asked_question.post_content: The truth is just about any industry can benefit from data science, whether you're in finance, healthcare, retail, manufacturing, or tech - if you can improve forecasting, catch fraud, personalise your marketing, get more out of your operations, better maintain equipment, or just stay on top of regulations, data science can give you a much needed boost.
frequently_asked_question.post_title: What industries benefit most from data science?

data.advanced_data_heading: Advanced Data Science Services for Your Business
data.advanced_data_description: With constant learning and upgrades, our Data Science Services team ensures you get solutions that don't just make your business profitable today, but they grow as you expand.
data.industries_section_description: Our experts work across various business verticals and apply domain-specific knowledge with flexible technology.

banner_section.banner_heading: Data Science Services for Smarter Business Decisions
banner_section.banner_description: We help businesses turn data into reliable insights that support confident, data-driven decisions. The data science services are designed to cater to your business objectives, integrate with existing systems, and deliver measurable results.
banner_section.highlighted_text: Applied data science solutions built for real-world decisions, not experiments!
banner_section.cta_text: Talk to a Data Science Expert

business_challenges_section_section.section_heading: Data Analytics Solutions for Your Business Challenges

business_challenges_fields.slide_top_description: Our analytical solutions can provide the data you need to address your specific problems or challenges, so you can move your business forward.
business_challenges_fields.slide_description: Sustainable revenue growth only comes about when you're making decisions based on solid data insight rather than just winging it. Our team helps your crew get a grip on what's driving your performance today and where future growth opportunities lie.

data_science_services_we_offer_section.heading: Data Science Services We Offer
data_science_services_we_offer_section.paragraph: Our team works well with data, making it easier to manage solutions and operations. We help you use your data for the best results.

blocks.title: Data Science Consulting
blocks.paragraph: If you need a single ML model to fix a real business problem, or you need a team to work on a full data science initiative, and don't want to guess how to proceed, our analysts and data scientists can help. We assist you with a clear roadmap, choose the right tech stack, and take practical paths to turn your data into something useful.

blocks.title: Data Science Solution Implementation
blocks.paragraph: We will execute your planned approach. Our knowledgeable team can create industry-based solutions that support better decision-making, improve efficiencies, reduce manual processes, increase safety, and enhance customer satisfaction. We will begin with a proof-of-concept (PoC) or minimum viable product (MVP) assessment before transitioning the solution to full-scale deployment.

blocks.title: Data Science Solution Upgrade
blocks.paragraph: If the existing system(s) you have are not aligned with your new objectives, we can provide strategic guidance and hands-on implementation. We will be able to provide assistance with all aspects of upgrading your current system(s), including designing new ML models, adding new software features and modules to existing solutions, upgrading the ML capabilities of existing systems, and helping you develop a solution that fits your business needs.

blocks.title: Data Science Solution Support
blocks.paragraph: We understand your solutions aren't just about timely deployment; they need constant maintenance. We monitor your ML models for accuracy, performance, and reliability. We resolve your problems fast and help you focus on your business while ensuring your solutions run smoothly.

our_process_section.short_description: Our data science team doesn't just build models. We build momentum! Our process is transparent and value-driven.

box_fields.box_description: We start by getting to know your business inside and out, understanding your existing data assets and how you're using AI in your day-to-day operations. We really want to find that sweet spot between what's doable, what's got some real value, and what's worth the risk.

Our team of data scientists will kick things off by getting a real close-up look at the data you've got, building some new features, and experimenting with different models to come up with a prototype that's fast-moving, reliable, and basically easy to explain.
We build our models using things like APIs, dashboards, edge deployments - basically whatever fits in with your existing cloud or on-premises infrastructure.

As your business grows and evolves, so too does your model. Our team is always keeping an eye on accuracy and fairness, and whether or not models are drifting away from their original purpose, and will retrain and re-adjust models so they continue to meet your needs.

how_we_work_section.section_description: We know that every business is different, so we've developed flexible engagement models tailored to your unique needs, capabilities, and goals.

right_side_fields.box_description: Think of it like hiring a team of top-notch data scientists and engineers to work with you as a fully-fledged extension of your own team.
You can work with a team that works for you under a clearly defined scope, timelines, and deliverables.
We help you with ongoing monitoring, optimization, and continuous improvement of analytics solutions.

how_we_work_section.cta_section_text: Hire Data Science Experts to Support Your Project!

why_choose_section.section_heading: Why Choose Code1 for Data Science Services
why_choose_section.section_description: Equip your business with data-driven decision frameworks and accelerators to streamline operations and ensure a well-defined workflow.

right_box_data.box_description: We focus on utilizing data science with a clear business purpose. The models, dashboards, and insights we evaluate are judged on real results - their impact on revenue, costs, or how well they help us steer clear of big risks. We put our focus where it counts: getting our analytics out there, and making sure they actually do some good in the real world, whether that's helping make better day-to-day decisions, or strategic ones too.

Our team has a track record of delivering top-notch solutions to businesses of all sizes - from startups to big, established enterprises across a wide range of industries. We can work with any level of data maturity, whatever technical setup you've got, and whatever constraints your organisation might be under - all while maintaining our usual level of quality and accountability.

Our engineers design data science solutions that can grow as fast as you need them to, while still keeping security, governance, and all the compliance requirements your enterprise needs under control. The architectures we create support just the right level of access, and we help get you in line with whatever regulations you need to follow - that way, the insights remain safe and sustainable, even as your data, users, and business grow.

tech_stack_tools_section.section_description: Our team of data science engineers leverages proven technologies across the full data science lifecycle.

box_fields.heading: Visualization
box_fields.text: Power BI, Tableau, Seaborn, Plotly, Matplotlib

box_fields.heading: Experimentation
box_fields.text: Jupyter, Databricks, MLflow, A/B Testing frameworks

box_fields.heading: Regulatory & Data Privacy Compliance
box_fields.description: Our data science services are built to meet the tough standards of global and regional data protection laws - think GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA & India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act from 2023. These are the rules we need to follow to ensure data is processed fairly, people can give consent, and personal data is kept safe across all industries. You can't just collect & use people's data without following the rules.

box_fields.heading: Information Security & Infrastructure Standards
box_fields.description: We stick to stuff like ISO/IEC 27001 & SOC 2 to check our security controls are in place, we're managing our risks, & our cloud operations are secure. When a client needs to hand over payment details, we're compliant with the Payment Card Industry Security Standards Council (PCI DSS) to ensure transactions are encrypted, access is restricted, and we're on top of potential vulnerabilities.

box_fields.heading: Secure Data & Model Management Practices
box_fields.description: We use these fancy role-based access controls, anonymization techniques, secure MLOps pipelines, DevSecOps practices & regular penetration testing to ensure the solutions we build keep our clients' data safe. All this to avoid data breaches, or someone getting a hold of it and using it for something nasty, while still being able to scale up safely and keep people's trust.

services_get_started_section.heading: Get Started with Data Science Services
services_get_started_section.paragraph: Let's discuss how our data science expertise can help you unlock actionable insights and drive measurable business outcomes.

buttons.cta_text: Talk to a Data Science Expert
